svg.title: Honeypot Security Concepts Infographic
svg.desc: Visual overview of honeypots, honeynets, honeyfiles, and honeytokens used in IT security deception strategies
svg.text: The Art of Deception in Cybersecurity
How security teams trap attackers using honeypots, honeynets & honeytokens
No legitimate user should access it —
Examples: API keys, emails, DB records
As attackers learn to detect honeypots, defenders make them more realistic. It's an evolving cat-and-mouse
game where deception complexity keeps pace with attacker sophistication.
